Class KeYLexer

java.lang.Object
org.antlr.v4.runtime.Recognizer<Integer, LexerATNSimulator>
org.antlr.v4.runtime.Lexer
de.uka.ilkd.key.nparser.KeYLexer
All Implemented Interfaces:
TokenSource
public class KeYLexer extends Lexer
